name: Creamy Skillet Turkey
recipeIngredient: 3 cups cooked turkey, chicken or ham, cubed
1 can condensed cream of mushroom soup
1 can Del Monte Cut Green Beans, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the turkey and thyme in oil in a skillet for 3 minutes.
2. Blend the soup with milk; add to the skillet along with the vegetables. Heat through.
3. Serve over hot buttered noodles, mashed potatoes or hot biscuits if desired.
